scripts.build: node scripts/sync-version.js && node ./node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=esnext --minify --outfile=behavior_pack/scripts/main.js --external:@minecraft/server --external:@minecraft/server-ui && node ./node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild src/client-main.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=esnext --minify --outfile=behavior_pack/scripts/client.js --external:@minecraft/server --external:@minecraft/server-ui && node scripts/deploy.js
scripts.build:production: node scripts/sync-version.js && node ./node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=esnext --minify --outfile=behavior_pack/scripts/main.js --external:@minecraft/server --external:@minecraft/server-ui && node ./node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild src/client-main.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=esnext --minify --outfile=behavior_pack/scripts/client.js --external:@minecraft/server --external:@minecraft/server-ui && node scripts/package-release.js
